name: IdsEdwLoadCOBRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte_min_cycle AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO, 'N' AS EDW_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'CLM_COB' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE tgt SET EDW_LOAD_IN = cte_min_cycle.EDW_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC tgt JOIN cte_min_cycle ON tgt.SRC_SYS_CD = cte_min_cycle.SRC_SYS_CD AND tgt.SUBJ_CD = cte_min_cycle.SUBJ_CD AND tgt.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte_min_cycle.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE tgt.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte_min_cycle.RUN_CYC_NO AND tgt.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

description:
MODIFICATIONS:

Called By : OptumMedDIdsEdwClmCobFCntl

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'N'
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS CLM_COB  with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
Description: This Job update the P_RUN_CYC  table .

Called By : OptumMedDIdsEdwClmCobFCntl
